title: Borrowed Reflexes
description: A pasted share code just took over the autobattle. The party discusses running a stranger's strategy.

steps.text: A stranger's strategy, pasted whole into the party's reflexes.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: We are now executing instructions from someone we have never met.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: It swings fine. Better cadence than mine, actually.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: I'd like it noted the stranger gave me more solos.
